passages.title: Passage 1: Cultural Heritage
passages.passageText: Vietnam has a rich cultural heritage. Preserving it is crucial for future generations. The government and people must collaborate. Many of Vietnams traditional customs and monuments are at risk due to modernization. Citizens must learn to appreciate and protect their cultural heritage. Monuments must be maintained by experts. Following the rules of preservation ensures survival of cultural treasures. It is important to understand the significance of these traditions.

passages.title: Passage 2: Education Paths
passages.passageText: Graduation is approaching. Are you choosing between university or vocational training? Academic track focuses on high-level qualifications. Vocational track focuses on practical skills. Consider an internship to earn while learning. Choosing a path may seem difficult initially. The right choice of institution will pave the way for future career. Having achieved excellent results, you deserve proper guidance to pick the perfect path.

passages.title: Passage 4: Heritage Reading
passages.passageText: Cultural heritage is important for preserving national identity. It includes historical sites and traditional customs. Heritage helps people understand their roots. Many countries make great efforts to protect heritage. Governments preserve ancient sites and promote cultural tourism. This creates economic benefits for local communities. Raising public awareness ensures long-term conservation of heritage.

questions.question: Q21: ___ ancient sites, governments promote tourism

passages.title: Passage 5: Independence
passages.passageText: Being independent is essential for young students. It helps them manage time and solve problems. Good time management keeps students on track. Setting goals and breaking tasks into smaller parts helps. Making small decisions like organizing materials builds confidence. Students gradually take on bigger decisions. Seeking help shows independence does not mean doing everything alone. Growth mindset means effort leads to improvement. Students become resilient by embracing challenges and learning from mistakes.

questions.question: Q23: Main idea of independence
options: A. Focus only on academic success
B. More confident in social situations
C. Essential and achieved through practical ways
D. Time management is most important

questions.question: Q24: NOT mentioned as a way
Q28: What helps develop independence
options: A. Avoid challenges to prevent mistakes
C. Break large tasks into smaller ones

questions.question: Q29: Which is TRUE
options: B. Growth mindset helps handle challenges

questions.question: Q30: What can be inferred
options: A. Never need help from others
C. Know when to seek help effectively
